name: Klotho and follistatin plasmid gene-therapy registry
summary: Recruiting single-group early phase 1 ClinicalTrials.gov study of injectable nonviral plasmid-delivered klotho and follistatin gene therapy in healthy adults, with biomarker, safety, cognitive, quality-of-life, epigenetic-age, physical-performance, inflammatory, renal, and metabolic endpoints but no posted results.

trial_details.expected_results_window: No completion date is recorded locally; no near-term result expectation should be assumed.
trial_details.horizon_note: No posted results are represented locally, so surveillance should watch for registry results or linked publications.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Neuroendocrine and Systemic Signal Reset because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers, safety, and function in Healthy adults aged 50 to 80 years. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
